---
title: "Blog"
---

---

<div class="blog-grid">

<div class="blog-card">
<a href="/Blog/upgrade_viva.qmd">A Review on UQ and Surrogate Modelling for Neural PDE Solvers</a>
</div>

<div class="blog-card">
<a href="/Blog/Inverse_kernel.qmd">Convolution as a Form of Integration</a>
</div>

<!-- [Uncertainty Quantification of Surrogate Models using Conformal Prediction](/Blog/SpatioTemporalCP_blog.md) -->

:::
<div class="blog-card">
<a href="/Blog/iterative_solvers.qmd">Iterative Solvers for Linear Systems</a>
</div>

<div class="blog-card">
<a href="/Blog/UPE.qmd">Universal Physics Engine</a>
</div>

<div class="blog-card">
<a href="/Blog/Geometry.qmd">Geometry for Neural PDEs</a>
</div>

<div class="blog-card">
<a href="/Blog/SPDEs.qmd">Stochastic PDEs</a>
</div>

</div>

<!-- [Neural ODE](/Blog/Neural_ODE.qmd) -->
<!-- [Neural Operators](/Blog/Neural_Operators.qmd) -->

<div class="blog-note">
Some of these blogposts might seem rather crude as they may be written as notes to self. You can find some of my earlier writing on <a href="https://medium.com/@engineoutcompletely">Medium</a>.
</div>
